design_intent: Information-first shrine exploration arranged as three readable rooms: 外大殿, 回廊, and 内殿. The player does not collect objects; they collect short contradictory records and the interface builds interpretation links.

rooms.label: 外大殿
rooms.purpose: Opening unease: an intact front hall with no lived-in traces and an altered old wooden plaque.

rooms.label: 回廊
rooms.purpose: Connect the corridor bamboo slips, clothing tag, and outfit-order tablet into the send-off evidence chain.

rooms.label: 内殿
rooms.purpose: Name Sayo after the entrance plaque and clothing chest reveal have been connected, then stage the final choice under the long-burning lamps.

clues.short_record: 迎狐之仪 surface text, hidden older 送*之仪 trace

clues.interaction: 打开衣箱 / 再看纸条
clues.short_record: paper slip first hides the character after 白, then reveals 白衣覆身 after the plaque changes
cedar base, white clothing, mugwort cover
Amemiya Sayo, age nine; name removal and fox-seat cost

interpretation_links.ui_result: 仪式名：迎狐之仪变成了送*之仪

interpretation_links.dialogue_result: 纸上写着白，后面的字被框住了。

interpretation_links.ui_result: 白狐身份：送行者：雨宫纱夜

reveal_sequence: Entrance plaque cycle: 迎狐之仪 -> 送*之仪; after all five records are understood, reaching FoxfirePickupMarker triggers the record-synthesis dialogue, then the player can collect foxfire from a blue lantern before revealing 送狐之仪.
After the plaque changes, the protagonist is prompted to return to the clothing chest and recheck the paper slip.
Archive interpretation reveal: the records describe sending a child away.
Identity reveal: the white fox's shadow reads as Sayo, the protagonist's sister.

endings.A: Do not call her name; the ritual completes, stability returns, and back-wall cuts imply erasure continues.
endings.B: Call Sayo by name; the ritual collapses, the environment breaks, and memory begins to return.

validation_targets: ArchiveTrigger3 is a paper chest interactable, not a pickup item.
The entrance plaque foxfire interaction is gated until all clue links are available.
The final identity reveal is gated until the player rechecks the chest paper.
The corridor raised platform uses TileMap collision, while room frames are visual/background props only.
Runtime backgrounds are regenerated level3 far/mid/near parallax layers showing 外大殿, 回廊, and 内殿 silhouettes.
